failedAssertions.reason: Cannot fully test without real E2B/Daytona sandbox executing tasks. CLI framework correctly created thread, initiated workflow, polled with cron, and tracked state - all framework contracts verified. Missing actual sandbox execution to reach terminal state.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated VAL-CLI-002, VAL-CLI-003, VAL-CLI-008 to passed status in Round 2

summary: User testing validation for validation-framework-repair milestone (Round 2): 11 of 12 assertions passed. Round 1 had 2 failures (TypeScript errors) and 2 blocked assertions. After fixes: TypeScript errors resolved (VAL-CLI-002, VAL-CLI-003 now pass), real e2e timeout path works (VAL-CLI-008 now passes). VAL-CLI-010 remains failed because full e2e success requires a real E2B/Daytona sandbox to execute tasks - the CLI framework itself is verified correct. All CLI framework contracts (preflight, snapshot, guardrails, fast/full profiles, e2e dry-run, timeout handling) are working as designed.
